issue_title: fix: bring back tooltips for group ids in release template and project default strategy forms
issue_body_preview:
The tooltip was removed by mistake when merging the form implementations previously. The current implementation is pretty much an exact mirror of the implementation in the original milestone strategy type flexible component at commit 91d318a4.

As a bonus, this also adds a tooltip to the group id
test_description_zh: 在发布模板（Release Template）和项目默认策略（Project Default Strategy）表单中，找到 Group ID 输入字段，将鼠标悬停在 Group ID 标签旁边的提示图标上，观察是否出现工具提示（Tooltip）信息。
expected_result_zh: 鼠标悬停在 Group ID 字段的提示图标上时，应正确显示 Tooltip 提示信息，解释 Group ID 的用途和含义。Tooltip 应在发布模板表单和项目默认策略表单中均正常显示。
